arts.ttl: Sven Botman breaks Newcastle United silence after injury nightmare & drops return date hint
arts.sum: Sven Botman has hinted that he could be available to play in Newcastle United's festive programme after appearing for the reserves against Chelsea. Botman played an hour of the 3-2 win against the Blues at Whitley Park in front of head coach Eddie Howe and will now hope to be in contention for the packed December fixture list after overcoming a horror ACL injury.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United fear points deduction as Eddie Howe assesses 'reality' of Amanda Staveley dream
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe admits that the fear of points deductions caused by PSR rules has had a "dramatic" effect on life at St James' Park. And Howe went one step further by saying the APT rules mean that Newcastle's precarious position with finances mean that they are living just as much in fear of points deductions, like Everton and Nottingham Forest suffered last term, as much as dreaming of trophies.

arts.ttl: Brentford, Brighton and Liverpool presented €15m signing chance – Discount now being offered
arts.sum: Brighton, Brentford and Liverpool have all been linked with a move for Genoa’s Morten Frendrup over the past few weeks. In October, it was suggested that Brentford were a favourite to land the midfielder. This came after Liverpool’s interest came to the fore in the summer, but it was stated that Genoa considered Frendrup ‘unsellable’ The post Brentford, Brighton and Liverpool presented €15m signing chance – Discount now being offered appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle could accept much less than £100m for Bruno Guimaraes in January
arts.sum: Newcastle United are still struggling to stay on the right side of the Premier League’s Profit and Sustainability Rules, and that could see them sell talisman, Bruno Guimaraes, for less than the £100m Man City were quoted in the summer. It’s understood that Guimaraes would be open to a move to the serial Premier League […] The post Newcastle could accept much less than £100m for Bruno Guimaraes in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United offer will be entertained – Player now in ‘best position’ to push for transfer
arts.sum: Last month, we covered claims from Belgium which stated Newcastle United have made Johan Bakayoko their priority target for January. It was also reported the Magpies are planning to make an offer to PSV Eindhoven. Journalist Sacha Tavolieri, writing in his column for Sky Sport CH, claims Newcastle have a keen interest in the winger. The post Newcastle United offer will be entertained – Player now in ‘best position’ to push for transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United 'agree deal in principle' to sell long-serving player in January transfer window
arts.sum: Newcastle United have agreed "a deal in principle" for Martin Dubravka ahead of the January window - according to strong reports in Saudi Arabia. Speaking about his goalkeeping options, Howe told Chronicle Live: "We have a very strong unit.

arts.ttl: 'I didn't know': Sven Botman was shocked by something that happened on his Newcastle under-21 injury return
arts.sum: Whilst Newcastle United will be in no mind to rush Sven Botman back from his lengthy injury for the first-team, it was an excellent moment...

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe and Alan Shearer in agreement as Newcastle United win has everyone saying the same thing
arts.sum: Three wins on the spin just over a month ago were followed up with a shoddy performance against struggling West Ham United, as Newcastle' s uncharacteristic inconsistency emerged once again. Even Alan Shearer, who has been so critical of Newcastle and their inconsistency of late, has hammered home the point that the Leicester display must be followed up in two 'important' games in the coming days.

arts.ttl: Sports Mole's Premier League Team of the Week - Amad Diallo, Alexander Isak, Son Heung-min
arts.sum: Sports Mole selects its Premier League Team of the Week for gameweek 15, including Amad Diallo, Alexander Isak and Son Heung-min.

arts.ttl: Classy Newcastle United reaction spotted after angry moment in Leicester win
arts.sum: towards the home fans, clearly having heard some audible groans after two guilt-edged chances went begging for the 29-year-old in the early stages of the match. Murphy was eventually withdrawn with Newcastle home and hosed, with the right-sided attacker having to walk all the way around the edge of the pitch, along with Tino Livramento, to make it back to the bench.
